mapper.sql: select s.sensor_record_id, s.gateway_record_id, s.external_company_id, s.external_company_name_snapshot, s.dept_id, d.dept_name, m.dept_id as mapped_dept_id, md.dept_name as mapped_dept_name, s.sensor_id, s.extinguisher_id, s.sensor_code, s.mac_address, s.assembly_address, s.extinguisher_body_serial_no, s.extinguisher_production_date, s.sensor_vendor_type, s.status, s.match_status, ss.sensor_code as matched_sensor_code, e.label_code as matched_extinguisher_label_code, g.gateway_imei, g.gateway_config_code, s.remark, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time from fe_sensor_manual_record s left join fe_gateway_manual_record g on s.gateway_record_id = g.record_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id left join fe_company_dept_mapping m on s.external_company_id = m.external_company_id left join sys_dept md on m.dept_id = md.dept_id left join fe_sensor ss on s.sensor_id = ss.sensor_id left join fe_extinguisher e on s.extinguisher_id = e.extinguisher_id
mapper.select: where s.gateway_record_id = #{gatewayRecordId} order by s.sensor_record_id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into fe_sensor_manual_record
gateway_record_id, external_company_id, external_company_name_snapshot, dept_id, sensor_id, extinguisher_id, sensor_code, mac_address, assembly_address, extinguisher_body_serial_no, extinguisher_production_date, sensor_vendor_type, status, match_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{gatewayRecordId}, #{externalCompanyId}, #{externalCompanyNameSnapshot}, #{deptId}, #{sensorId}, #{extinguisherId}, #{sensorCode}, #{macAddress}, #{assemblyAddress}, #{extinguisherBodySerialNo}, #{extinguisherProductionDate}, #{sensorVendorType}, #{status}, #{matchStatus}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
